title: rosa × insignis
intro: Rosa × insignis, also known as the Portland rose, is a hybrid rose species that is a cross between Rosa centifolia and Rosa rubiginosa. This plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine, particularly for its astringent and antiseptic properties, which have been found to possess medicinal properties in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × insignis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Rosa × insignis can be prepared in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
